title: taraxacum tanyphyllum
intro: Taraxacum tanyphyllum, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum tanyphyllum include its ability to support liver health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum tanyphyllum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some traditional dishes.
